W.^Jtfa. 301 ( 3T) flpTRj 20-3-1995. j I MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (Department of Commerce) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 20tfa February, 2006 • i S.O. pu (2S sec Co dat;d 28(E).—Whereas a draft of certain rules to amend ths pulflisried, as required by sub-section (1) of section 45 of 1953), in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, F i rt-II, section (ii), vide notification of the Government of In( ia in Commerce and Industry (Department of Commerce) i umber 21st September 2005 for inviting objections oi peitsons likely to be affected thereby, within a period (£ forty- the date on which the copies of the Gazette of not ification were made available to the public. TeaRu of the es, 1954 was lea Act, 1953 Section 3, Sub- the Ministry of .0. 1377(E), suggestions from all five days from wntaining the ndia avi And whereas the copies of the said Gazette iUtificatic n ilable to the public on 23rd September, 2005; i j was made And whereas no objections or suggestions have iken received from the public by the Central Government; I; . -- 2 of 3 -- [ * J P T I I — W S 3 < i i ) ] _ _ _ ^IRg^BTINHsl : <H-HJMK"I Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (I) and clause (J) of sub-section (2) of section 49 of the Tea Act, 1953 (29 of 1953), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Tea Rules, 1954, namely :- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Tea (Amendment) Rules, 2006. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their final publication in the official Gazette. 2. In the Tea Rules, 1954, in the proviso to rule 37, for the words "six months", the words "twenty years" shall be substituted [F. No. T-17014/3/2004-Plant (A)] A SENGUPTA, Addl. Secy. Note :—The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide number SRO 1026 dated 25th March, 1954, and subsequently amended vide numbers: 1. G.S.R. 674 dated 25-4-1979; 2. G.S.R1081dated4-12-1986; 3. G.S.R. 169 dated 2-3-1987; 4. S.O. 382(E) dated 30-5-1991; 5. G.S.R 932(E) dated 16-12-1992; and 6. G.S.R 301(E) dated 20-3-1995.
